'''shazhuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enbyfriend|enbyfriend]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-zh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enbyfriend|enbyfriend]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shazhuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæzhiyith|shæzhiyith]] || [[word:shæzhiyij|shæzhiyij]] || [[word:shæzhiyish|shæzhiyish]] || [[word:shæzhiyi|shæzhiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shazhuzhuyuth|shazhuzhuyuth]] || [[word:shazhuzhuyuj|shazhuzhuyuj]] || [[word:shazhuzhuyush|shazhuzhuyush]] || [[word:shazhuzhuyu|shazhuzhuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shazhuyuth|shazhuyuth]] || [[word:shazhuyuj|shazhuyuj]] || [[word:shazhuyush|shazhuyush]] || [[word:shazhuyu|shazhuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shazhufyuth|shazhufyuth]] || [[word:shazhufyuj|shazhufyuj]] || [[word:shazhufyush|shazhufyush]] || [[word:shazhufyuf|shazhufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shazhuyuthu|shazhuyuthu]] || [[word:shazhuyuju|shazhuyuju]] || [[word:shazhuyushu|shazhuyushu]] || [[word:shazhuyuku|shazhuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shazhuyuth|shazhuyuth]] || [[word:shazhuyuj|shazhuyuj]] || [[word:shazhuyush|shazhuyush]] || [[word:shazhuyu|shazhuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shazhuyuthul|shazhuyuthul]] || [[word:shazhuyujul|shazhuyujul]] || [[word:shazhuyushul|shazhuyushul]] || [[word:shazhuyukul|shazhuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shazhuyuthuthu|shazhuyuthuthu]] || [[word:shazhuyujuju|shazhuyujuju]] || [[word:shazhuyushushu|shazhuyushushu]] || [[word:shazhuyuku|shazhuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shazhuyuthun|shazhuyuthun]] || [[word:shazhuyujun|shazhuyujun]] || [[word:shazhuyushun|shazhuyushun]] || [[word:shazhuyukun|shazhuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shazhuyuthuoro|shazhuyuthuoro]] || [[word:shazhuyujuoro|shazhuyujuoro]] || [[word:shazhuyushuoro|shazhuyushuoro]] || [[word:shazhuyukuoro|shazhuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
